'''nahuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qilin|qilin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-h-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qilin|qilin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nahuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næhizith|næhizith]] || [[word:næhizij|næhizij]] || [[word:næhizish|næhizish]] || [[word:næhizi|næhizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nahuhuzuth|nahuhuzuth]] || [[word:nahuhuzuj|nahuhuzuj]] || [[word:nahuhuzush|nahuhuzush]] || [[word:nahuhuzu|nahuhuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nahuzuth|nahuzuth]] || [[word:nahuzuj|nahuzuj]] || [[word:nahuzush|nahuzush]] || [[word:nahuzu|nahuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nahufzuth|nahufzuth]] || [[word:nahufzuj|nahufzuj]] || [[word:nahufzush|nahufzush]] || [[word:nahufzuf|nahufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nahuzuthu|nahuzuthu]] || [[word:nahuzuju|nahuzuju]] || [[word:nahuzushu|nahuzushu]] || [[word:nahuzuku|nahuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nahuzuth|nahuzuth]] || [[word:nahuzuj|nahuzuj]] || [[word:nahuzush|nahuzush]] || [[word:nahuzu|nahuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nahuzuthul|nahuzuthul]] || [[word:nahuzujul|nahuzujul]] || [[word:nahuzushul|nahuzushul]] || [[word:nahuzukul|nahuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nahuzuthuthu|nahuzuthuthu]] || [[word:nahuzujuju|nahuzujuju]] || [[word:nahuzushushu|nahuzushushu]] || [[word:nahuzuku|nahuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nahuzuthun|nahuzuthun]] || [[word:nahuzujun|nahuzujun]] || [[word:nahuzushun|nahuzushun]] || [[word:nahuzukun|nahuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nahuzuthuoro|nahuzuthuoro]] || [[word:nahuzujuoro|nahuzujuoro]] || [[word:nahuzushuoro|nahuzushuoro]] || [[word:nahuzukuoro|nahuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
